zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Yarmouth於1450年5月1日出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可亞爾姆斯時，她的父親Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer30歲，母親Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham24歲。她於1472年與Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1510年1月1日在她的家鄉享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Yarmouth于1450年5月1日出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可亞爾姆斯时，她的父亲Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer30岁，母亲Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham24岁。她于1472年与Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth在英国英格兰諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1510年1月1日在她的家乡享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Yarmouth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Great Yarmouth (Norfolk), Little Yarmouth (Suffolk), or Yarmouth (IoW).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Yarmouth was born on 1 May 1450, in Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer, was 30 and her mother, Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham, was 24. She married Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth in 1472, in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 1 January 1510, in her hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Yarmouth est née le 1 mai 1450, à Yarmouth, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth en 1472, à Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 janvier 1510, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.Great Yarmouth, Great Yarmouth, Norfolk,: Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Yarmouth am 1. Mai 1450 in Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham 24. Sie hat 1472 in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Januar 1510 im Alter von 59 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Yarmouth è nata il il 1 maggio 1450 nel Yarmouth, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth nel 1472, nel Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 gennaio 1510, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Yarmouthが1450年5月1日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクヤーモウスで生まれた時，父Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequerは30歳，母Lady Alice Elizabeth Tateshamは24歳であった。1472年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクグレアト ヤーモウスでSir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1510年1月1日に故郷で59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Yarmouth(이)가 1450년 5월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 야모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1472년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그리트 야모우스에서 Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 1월 1일 그녀의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Yarmouth nasceu em 1 de maio de 1450, em Yarmouth, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth em 1472, em Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1510, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos.

ro.Great Yarmouth, Great Yarmouth, Norfolk,: Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Yarmouth родилась 1 мая 1450 г. в местности ярмоут, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth в 1472 г. в местности грит ярмоут, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 января 1510 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.

Se casó con Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth en 1472, en Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de enero de 1510, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años.
